A Bernoulli process is a finite or infinite sequence of independent random variables
Independence of the trials implies that the process is memoryless
the future trials constitute a Bernoulli process identical to the whole process, the fresh-start property
the individual variables X i may be called Bernoulli trials with parameter p
Several random variables and probability distributions beside the Bernoullis may be derived from the Bernoulli process
The Bernoulli process can be formalized in the language of probability spaces as a random sequence of independent realisations of a random variable
These sets of finite sequences are referred to as cylinder sets in the product topology
